prompt: I need to pull CAD IG OAS spreads (the broad Canadian investment grade index) from 2018 to today, daily. I also want to know where spreads are right now vs history — tight, wide, how many standard deviations out, that kind of thing. Generate me the Python code to do it.
assertions: The code fetches I05510CA Index with INDEX_OAS_TSY_BP field (or uses cad_oas alias)
The code generates a spread intelligence summary including percentile rank vs history
The code includes a Z-score or standard deviation calculation for current spreads
The code uses the correct start date of 2018 or earlier for history context
The code uses uv run python or references the virtual environment for execution
